title: Savory Stir-Fry
description: Quick and easy stir-fry recipe with savory flavors. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the thinly sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the broccoli and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the savory stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, and grated ginger.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
